name: Sutton Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and agricultural financing with branches in Ohio.
description_long:
Sutton Bank is a full-service FDIC-insured community bank positioned as "Old-fashioned Innovation," combining traditional banking values with modern digital services. The institution serves individuals, small businesses, and agricultural clients across Ohio with a network of physical branches and online banking platforms.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including multiple checking account options (Kasasa Cash, Choice, BankAdvantage, Investment), savings accounts, money market accounts, CDs, IRAs, and personal credit cards. For lending, Sutton provides personal loans, auto loans, home mortgages (in partnership with Rocket Mortgage for streamlined application), and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs). The business division serves small to mid-sized companies and agricultural operations with business checking, savings, commercial real estate loans, term loans, operating lines of credit, equipment financing, and leasing options. Agricultural clients have access to specialized ag loans including working capital loans, equipment loans, livestock financing, and ag real estate mortgages.

Sutton differentiates itself through strong agricultural lending expertise, partnership with Rocket Mortgage for residential lending, and branded deposit products under the Kasasa platform (offering no-fee checking with cash rewards). The bank emphasizes accessibility, maintains physical branch locations, and provides treasury management and merchant services for business clients. Digital capabilities include online banking, mobile app access, mobile wallet integration, Zelle payments, and remote deposit capture for business customers.

As a regional community bank, Sutton Bank is most suitable for customers seeking personalized service with FDIC insurance backing and established branch presence in Ohio. The main limitation is geographic constraint—the bank operates primarily in Ohio, making it inaccessible to out-of-state customers. The website does not clearly delineate all service fees or highlight competitive advantages in rates versus national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Free Kasasa Cash Checking and Kasasa Cash Back Checking accounts
Personal savings accounts, money market accounts, and CDs
Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) for personal and business
Personal loans, auto loans, home mortgages, and HELOCs
Commercial real estate loans and business term loans
Operating lines of credit and equipment leasing
Agricultural loans (ag lines of credit, equipment, livestock, working capital, real estate)
Mobile banking app, online banking, and mobile wallet
Zelle payments, remote deposit capture, merchant card services, and treasury management
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
No-fee Kasasa Cash checking account with rewards and no minimum balance requirement
Comprehensive agricultural lending program (ag lines of credit, equipment, livestock, working capital loans)
Partnership with Rocket Mortgage for streamlined online home loan applications
Multiple business lending products including commercial real estate, term loans, and equipment leasing
Digital banking tools including mobile app, Zelle, mobile wallet, and remote deposit capture
Established community bank presence with physical branch locations and drive-thru access
cons: Geographic limitation: operates primarily in Ohio, unavailable to out-of-state customers
Website does not transparently disclose account fees, APRs, or rate comparisons versus competitors
Kasasa products carry qualifying criteria (direct deposit, debit card usage, online statements) not fully detailed on homepage
Limited clarity on business credit card features and consumer credit card rewards structure
No mention of investment advisory services despite listing "Investments" in navigation menu
best_for: Ohio-based small business owners seeking agricultural or commercial lending with personal service
Individuals wanting no-fee checking with rewards through the Kasasa Cash account
Homebuyers in Ohio looking to refinance or purchase with streamlined Rocket Mortgage integration
Agricultural operations requiring specialized lending for equipment, land, or working capital
diagnosis: Sutton Bank is best for Ohio-based customers—particularly agricultural and small business clients—seeking FDIC-insured banking with established branch relationships and specialized lending expertise. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to Ohio; out-of-state customers cannot access accounts, making this unsuitable for those requiring multi-state or national banking convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
